title: Stella radiata
intro: Stella radiata, also known as Star of Bethlehem, is a perennial plant in the lily family (Liliaceae), characterized by its star-shaped flowers and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Stella radiata include its ability to alleviate anxiety and insomnia, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating headaches, muscle pain, and other conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Stella radiata is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is commonly available in herbal supplement form, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
